description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a clean, geometric design and a predominantly white and gray exterior. The structure features large rectangular windows, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. There is an attached garage with a car parked in the driveway, and the backyard includes a swimming pool, hot tub, and outdoor seating area. The house appears to be a single story with an open floor plan, visible through the cutaway view. The outdoor spaces are well-integrated with the house, including a patio and landscaped elements. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with an emphasis on horizontal lines and open, functional living areas.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, attached garage, and backyard amenities including a pool and patio. The design is minimalist and geometric, with white and gray tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, attached garage with a car, and large windows along the facade.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard with a pool, hot tub, patio furniture, and additional outdoor structures.
description_view_2: Side view focusing on the backyard amenities, including the pool, hot tub, and patio, as well as the open layout of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and a clearer look at the house's flat roof and window arrangement.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door with no porch, minimal steps, and a clean, unadorned facade.
